text:
RepoPulse forecast (7-day breakout watchlist)

Method: reproducible baseline model using public GitHub signals (no LLM).
Breakout = +max(200 stars, +50%) within 7 days.

1) zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw | 97% | stars now 19502 → est 34003 (range 33921-34085)
   https://github.com/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
2) cloudflare/vinext | 96% | stars now 3414 → est 18719 (range 18694-18744)
   https://github.com/cloudflare/vinext
3) HKUDS/ClawWork | 95% | stars now 5580 → est 10586 (range 10548-10624)
   https://github.com/HKUDS/ClawWork
4) peteromallet/dataclaw | 94% | stars now 1088 → est 8002 (range 7977-8027)
   https://github.com/peteromallet/dataclaw
5) Panniantong/Agent-Reach | 94% | stars now 1340 → est 6978 (range 6953-7003)
   https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach

Daily forecasts are logged publicly, then scored 7 days later (hits, misses, calibration).
#opensource #software #datascience #forecasting #github
